feed.title: Requests
feed.placeholderBody: Open booking requests from owners will appear here. You'll be able to review the request, see the dog and the owner's profile, and submit a bid.

messages.title: Messages
messages.placeholderBody: A unified inbox is on the way. For now, every booking has its own chat thread — open a booking to talk with the other party.

auth.continueWithEmailLink: Continue with your email or username →
auth.agreementLead: By continuing, you agree to PetWalker's
auth.agreementMid: and to occasionally receive emails from us. Please read our
auth.agreementTail: to learn how we use your personal data.

providers.title: Find a provider
providers.empty: No providers offering {{service}} within {{radius}} km of this location.
providers.tryWiden: Try widening the radius or switching service type via Refine search.
providers.searchPlaceholder: Search providers by name or bio…

form.locationHint: Set the centre of your search. Defaults to NYC for the seed dataset.

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.placeholder: How was your walk? Anything other owners should know?
reviews.starsRequired: Please pick a star rating before submitting.

favorites.title: Saved providers
favorites.subtitle: Providers you've hearted from search or detail pages.
favorites.emptyHint: Tap the heart on a provider to save it for later.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account, role, and (if you provide services) your public profile, prices, and schedule.
profile.switchRoleHint: Switch to Provider or Both to expose your service-provider sections.
profile.becomeProviderHint: Switch your role to Provider or Both above to set up your bio, prices, and working hours.
profile.serviceAddressHint: Where this service is performed if it differs from your home address. Leave blank to use your account address.

calendar.title: Google Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Connect your Google Calendar so busy times are excluded from booking slots.
calendar.hint: We'll only see when you're busy — not what's on your calendar. Re-syncs every 30 minutes; you can also trigger a sync now.
calendar.disconnectBody: We'll delete the saved tokens and any synced busy times. Bookings already taken stay.
calendar.notConfigured: Google Calendar isn't set up on this server yet — ask the admin to configure GOOGLE_OAUTH_* env vars.

unavailability.title: Time off
unavailability.hint: Recurring bookings skip dates that fall in these windows (vacations, etc.).

profile.providerProfileHint: Public info shown on your provider listing card and detail page.

errors.network: Can't reach the server. Check your connection.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.
errors.outsideAvailability: Provider isn't available at this time.
errors.overlappingBooking: That slot is already booked. Pick another time.
errors.externalCalendarConflict: Provider is busy on their calendar at this time.
errors.ownerAddressMissing: Set a home address on your account or this pet before booking.
errors.providerAddressMissing: Provider hasn't set a service address — pick a different location.
errors.customAddressRequired: Type the address where the service should happen.
errors.addressSourceNotSupported: Provider doesn't accept that location for this service.
errors.providerNoOffering: This provider doesn't offer this service.
errors.scheduledTooSoon: Pick a time at least 5 minutes from now.
errors.providerNotOnboarded: Provider hasn't finished payout setup yet.

confirms.removeOfferingBody: You can add it back later.
confirms.signOutBody: You'll need to sign in again.

booking.noSlots: No free slots in this window. Try the next 7 days.
booking.ownerHome: (Set a home address on this pet or your account)
booking.customAddressHint: Where the service should happen — street, neighborhood, anything that helps the provider find it.

address.label: Address
address.homeHint: Used as the default booking pickup. Leave blank if you'd rather pick a location at booking time.
address.petHint: Override your home address for this pet — useful if the pet lives elsewhere.

aboutMe.label: About me
aboutMe.placeholder: Tell other pet parents a bit about yourself, your experience, and how you care for animals.
aboutMe.hint: Shown on your public profile and provider listing card.
aboutMe.empty: You haven't added a bio yet.

currency.label: Display currency
currency.hint: Used for prices and invoices across the app. You can change this any time.

security.hint: Manage how you sign in and what devices have access to your account.
security.emailHint: Used to sign in. To change it, contact support.
security.linkedAccountHint: Internal identifier from your authentication provider. Useful when contacting support.
security.passwordHint: Change the password you use to sign in.
security.twoFactorHint: Add a one-time code from an authenticator app for stronger sign-in security.
security.sessionsHint: Review devices currently signed in to your account and sign them out remotely.

paymentMethods.title: Payment methods
paymentMethods.hint: Save credit cards for faster checkout.
paymentMethods.body: Credit-card vaulting via Stripe SetupIntent isn't wired up yet — for now, payment is collected at booking time.

billingHistory.title: Billing history
billingHistory.body: Invoice PDFs and a sortable history of charges land in the next phase. Per-booking receipts are available from each booking detail page.

paymentMethods.empty: You haven't saved any cards yet.
paymentMethods.devFormTitle: Dev mode — fake card details (no real Stripe)
paymentMethods.realStripeNotYetWired: Stripe Elements integration is part of a follow-up slice. With STRIPE_SECRET_KEY set, the SetupIntent endpoint already mints real intents — hooking up the client-side Elements form is the remaining step.
paymentMethods.confirmRemoveBody: This detaches the card from your Stripe Customer. You can add it again any time.

billingHistory.empty: No charges yet. Once you book and pay for a service, it will appear here.

language.hint: Saved on this device — picked up on every page load.
